title.en: Pigment Incompatibility — Lead + Sulphur Goes Black

subtitle.en: historic combinations spell trouble: white lead next to ultramarine darkens at the boundary because PbS forms; cadmium yellow + copper green also degrade slowly
subtitle.ko: 역사적 조합은 위험 — 백연과 울트라마린 경계는 PbS로 검어진다; 카드뮴 황 + 구리 녹도 천천히 변질

description.en: Toggle four famous pigment pairs; each shows the boundary darkening band, the reaction product, and a severity score. Last option (Zn+Fe₂O₃) is compatible — control case.
description.ko: 유명 안료 쌍 토글; 경계 어두워짐, 반응 산물, 심각도 점수. 마지막 (Zn+Fe₂O₃)는 호환 — 대조군.
